title: Department Manager Vacancy at Berger Silk Store - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Berger Silk Store - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
